query_pattern: SELECT ... FROM forge.observations FINAL WHERE ingested_at > :wm AND ingested_at <= :ts - 3min ORDER BY metric_id, instrument_id, observed_at
notes: Synthetic data with source_id='__benchmark__', ingested_at=2099-01-01. 3 runs each, median taken. Cleanup via DELETE FROM forge.observations WHERE source_id='__benchmark__'. ReplacingMergeTree FINAL dedup on watermark-scoped delta is sub-second even at 500k.
